diagrams.title: Vector addition: the parallelogram rule
diagrams.caption: Two vectors V1 and V2 acting on object X. The resultant R is found by translating V2 so its origin matches V1's, drawing parallels to each, and taking the diagonal.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 360' role='img' aria-label='Vector addition diagram'><defs><marker id='arr1' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='currentColor'/></marker><marker id='arrA' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--accent)'/></marker></defs><g font-family='inherit' font-size='13' fill='currentColor'><circle cx='110' cy='240' r='4' fill='currentColor'/><text x='90' y='258' fill='var(--text-soft)'>X</text><line x1='110' y1='240' x2='280' y2='200' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2.5' marker-end='url(#arr1)'/><text x='180' y='215' fill='var(--text-soft)'>V₁</text><line x1='110' y1='240' x2='220' y2='100' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2.5' marker-end='url(#arr1)'/><text x='150' y='155' fill='var(--text-soft)'>V₂</text><line x1='280' y1='200' x2='390' y2='60' stroke='var(--text-dim)' stroke-width='1.2' stroke-dasharray='4 4'/><line x1='220' y1='100' x2='390' y2='60' stroke='var(--text-dim)' stroke-width='1.2' stroke-dasharray='4 4'/><line x1='110' y1='240' x2='390' y2='60' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='3' marker-end='url(#arrA)'/><text x='245' y='150' fill='var(--accent)' font-weight='700'>R = V₁ + V₂</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Forces on a paraglider in stable glide
diagrams.caption: In steady glide, the resultant aerodynamic force R (vector sum of lift L and drag D) is equal and opposite to the total weight W. R is perpendicular to the flight path.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 600 360' role='img' aria-label='Force balance in stable glide'><defs><marker id='arr2' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='currentColor'/></marker><marker id='arrAc' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--accent)'/></marker><marker id='arrBad' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='9' refY='5' markerWidth='5' markerHeight='5' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z' fill='var(--bad)'/></marker></defs><g font-family='inherit' font-size='13'><path d='M150,140 Q300,90 470,140' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/><line x1='150' y1='140' x2='310' y2='190' stroke='var(--text-dim)' stroke-width='1.2'/><line x1='470' y1='140' x2='310' y2='190' stroke='var(--text-dim)' stroke-width='1.2'/><circle cx='310' cy='210' r='6' fill='currentColor'/><text x='325' y='216' fill='var(--text-soft)' font-size='12'>pilot</text><line x1='310' y1='210' x2='420' y2='285' stroke='var(--text-dim)' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-dasharray='5 3'/><text x='405' y='305' fill='var(--text-dim)' font-size='11'>flight path</text><line x1='310' y1='210' x2='310' y2='320' stroke='var(--bad)' stroke-width='3' marker-end='url(#arrBad)'/><text x='320' y='280' fill='var(--bad)' font-weight='700'>W (weight)</text><line x1='310' y1='210' x2='240' y2='115' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='3' marker-end='url(#arrAc)'/><text x='130' y='100' fill='var(--accent)' font-weight='700'>R (resultant)</text><line x1='310' y1='210' x2='275' y2='160' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' marker-end='url(#arr2)'/><text x='245' y='160' fill='currentColor'>L</text><line x1='310' y1='210' x2='370' y2='177' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' marker-end='url(#arr2)'/><text x='380' y='180' fill='currentColor'>D</text></g></svg>

diagrams.title: Swiss airspace cross-section: Mittelland vs. Alps
diagrams.caption: North of the Glider-Map dividing line: airspace E ends at FL100 (≈ 3050 m). In the Alps: E extends to FL130 with MIL-ON, FL150 (≈ 4550 m) with MIL-OFF. Below: airspace G ends at 600 m AGL.
diagrams.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 700 360' role='img' aria-label='Swiss airspace cross-section'><g font-family='inherit' font-size='12'><rect x='30' y='35' width='640' height='285' fill='var(--bg-soft)' stroke='var(--border)'/><line x1='350' y1='35' x2='350' y2='320' stroke='var(--text-dim)' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-dasharray='6 4'/><text x='190' y='30' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>Mittelland / Jura</text><text x='510' y='30' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='700' fill='var(--text)'>Alps</text><path d='M30,300 L130,300 L160,295 L200,290 L240,295 L290,300 L350,302 L350,300 L380,250 L420,180 L460,140 L500,170 L540,200 L580,250 L620,290 L670,300 L670,320 L30,320 z' fill='var(--text-dim)' fill-opacity='0.35' stroke='var(--text-soft)' stroke-width='1.2'/><rect x='30' y='265' width='320' height='35' fill='var(--good)' fill-opacity='0.20'/><rect x='350' y='35' width='320' height='95' fill='var(--bad)' fill-opacity='0.12'/><rect x='30' y='35' width='320' height='95' fill='var(--bad)' fill-opacity='0.12'/><rect x='30' y='130' width='320' height='135' fill='var(--accent)' fill-opacity='0.15'/><rect x='350' y='130' width='320' height='100' fill='var(--accent)' fill-opacity='0.15'/><rect x='350' y='230' width='320' height='35' fill='var(--good)' fill-opacity='0.20'/><text x='190' y='162' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14' font-weight='700' fill='var(--accent)'>E (3050 m / FL100)</text><text x='510' y='176' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14' font-weight='700' fill='var(--accent)'>E (FL130 / FL150)</text><text x='190' y='75' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14' font-weight='700' fill='var(--bad)'>C (controlled)</text><text x='510' y='75' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14' font-weight='700' fill='var(--bad)'>C (controlled)</text><text x='190' y='285' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' font-weight='700' fill='var(--good)'>G (600 m AGL)</text><text x='510' y='250' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' font-weight='700' fill='var(--good)'>G (600 m AGL)</text><text x='670' y='130' text-anchor='end' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-dim)'>3050 m AMSL</text><text x='670' y='225' text-anchor='end' font-size='10' fill='var(--text-dim)'>3950 m / 4550 m</text></g></svg>
